description: Reusable risk flag templates mapped to common Australian visa refusal patterns. Used for readiness guidance, not outcome prediction.

flags.title: Purpose statement appears generic
flags.description: The personal statement explaining the purpose of travel, study, or relationship appears short or generic.
flags.why_it_matters: Decision makers assess whether the applicant's stated purpose is credible and consistent.
suggested_actions: Write a clear purpose statement specific to your situation
Explain why Australia is relevant to your plans
Support your explanation with documents where possible

flags.title: Course choice may not align with background
flags.description: The proposed study program appears unrelated to previous education or work history.
flags.why_it_matters: Weak course alignment can make the study plan harder to assess.
suggested_actions: Explain the career reasoning behind the course choice
Show how the course fits future employment plans

flags.title: Travel purpose unclear
flags.description: The reason for travel is not clearly supported by documents or itinerary.
flags.why_it_matters: An unclear travel purpose can reduce confidence that the visit is temporary.
suggested_actions: Explain the purpose of the visit

flags.title: Weak employment ties to home country
flags.description: Employment evidence is missing or does not clearly show ongoing work commitments.
flags.why_it_matters: Strong employment ties can support the intention to return home.

flags.title: Family ties not documented
flags.description: Family relationships in the home country are not clearly described or supported.
flags.why_it_matters: Family connections may help demonstrate reasons to return home.

flags.title: Property or asset ties unclear
flags.description: Property or long-term asset ties are not documented.
flags.why_it_matters: Assets can demonstrate ongoing commitments outside Australia.

flags.title: Available funds may be insufficient
flags.description: Financial evidence suggests funds may not cover travel or study costs.
flags.why_it_matters: Applicants generally need to show they can support themselves during their stay.

flags.title: Large bank deposits unexplained
flags.description: Recent large deposits appear without supporting explanation.
flags.why_it_matters: Unexplained funds can reduce confidence in financial records.

flags.title: Sponsor financial support unclear
flags.description: Sponsor financial capacity is not fully evidenced.
flags.why_it_matters: Where financial support is provided, it should be clearly documented.

flags.title: Timeline conflict detected
flags.description: Dates across documents appear inconsistent.
flags.why_it_matters: Conflicting timelines can reduce confidence in the information provided.

flags.title: Unexplained timeline gap
flags.description: Periods of time are not accounted for in employment, study, or travel history.
flags.why_it_matters: Timeline gaps can lead to additional questions during assessment.

flags.title: Name variation across documents
flags.description: Different names or spellings appear across documents.
flags.why_it_matters: Identity consistency helps prevent confusion during assessment.

flags.title: Address history inconsistent
flags.description: Addresses listed across documents do not align.
flags.why_it_matters: Consistent address history helps establish credibility.

flags.title: Primary document missing
flags.description: A core document required for the visa subclass has not been uploaded.
flags.why_it_matters: Missing primary evidence may leave key requirements unsupported.

flags.title: Document translation missing
flags.description: Non-English documents appear without translation.
flags.why_it_matters: Translated documents help ensure information can be assessed clearly.

flags.title: Relationship evidence limited
flags.description: Evidence across financial, household, social, and commitment areas appears limited.
flags.why_it_matters: Partner visa applications rely on multiple forms of relationship evidence.

flags.title: Points claim may be incorrect
flags.description: Points claimed may not match supporting evidence.
flags.why_it_matters: Incorrect points claims can affect eligibility for skilled pathways.

flags.title: Skills assessment missing
flags.description: A skills assessment has not been provided where expected.
flags.why_it_matters: Skilled migration pathways often require skills assessment evidence.

flags.title: Selected visa stream may not match circumstances
flags.description: Applicant information may align better with another visa stream.
flags.why_it_matters: Incorrect stream selection can create unnecessary complications.

flags.title: Application timing risk
flags.description: Eligibility may depend on timing windows approaching expiry.
flags.why_it_matters: Some visas require applications within strict timing rules.

flags.title: Information appears inconsistent or misleading
flags.description: Application data appears inconsistent across documents.
flags.why_it_matters: Incorrect or misleading information can have serious consequences under migration law.

flags.title: Previous visa history may be missing
flags.description: Past visas or refusals may not be documented.
flags.why_it_matters: Accurate disclosure helps maintain credibility in the application.
